summary: Completed testing of iteration 89 - Backend refactoring (extracted debt, goals, currency routes) and Data Health Badge enhancement. All 9 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend features tested and working correctly.

issues: Minor: Console warnings about DialogContent missing aria-describedby - accessibility improvement recommended
Minor: Chart width/height warnings during initial render (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Backend refactoring - extracted routes working correctly:
- GET /api/debt returns user debts (routes/debt.py)
- GET /api/goals returns user goals (routes/goals.py)
- GET /api/currency/rates?base=USD returns exchange rates (routes/currency.py)
- GET /api/currency/rates?base=USDT returns USDT rates via CoinGecko
VERIFIED: Regression tests pass - existing endpoints still work:
- GET /api/profit/sync-validation returns validation data
- POST /api/profit/balance-override creates override entry
- GET /api/profit/summary returns account stats
VERIFIED: Data Health Badge (data-testid='data-health-badge'):
- Shows '50% complete 4 days missing Fix' on Profit Tracker page
- Clicking badge opens Pre-Sync Wizard dialog
VERIFIED: Pre-Sync Wizard (data-testid='pre-sync-wizard-dialog'):
- Opens from Data Health Badge click
- Opens from Sync button click
- Shows Step 2 (Missing Days) with 4 unreported trading days
VERIFIED: Transaction Record Dialogs (extracted to TransactionRecords.jsx):
- Deposit Records dialog shows deposits table correctly
- Withdrawal Records dialog shows empty state correctly
- Commission Records dialog shows commissions table correctly
VERIFIED: deps.py shared module initialized correctly in server.py (lines 111-117)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 89 tested backend refactoring and Data Health Badge enhancement. All extracted routes (debt, goals, currency) are working. The Data Health Badge shows data completeness percentage and clicking it opens the Pre-Sync Wizard. The TransactionRecords.jsx components (DepositRecordsDialog, WithdrawalRecordsDialog, CommissionRecordsDialog) are working correctly. Key data-testids: data-health-badge, pre-sync-wizard-dialog, sync-balance-btn. Note: The test user Ryan Salvador has 4 missing trade days (2026-02-02, 2026-02-06, 2026-02-10, 2026-02-11) shown in the wizard.
